compiled_state.title: Rename tests_run to hypothesis_tests in all 10 investigation prompt files
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

For each of the 10 explicitly named prompt files, apply the hypothesis_tests schema rename:

### Files
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/basic-investigation.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/intermediate-investigation.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/intermediate-investigation-fallback.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/advanced-investigation-agent-a.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/advanced-investigation-agent-b.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/cluster-investigation.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/escalated-investigation-agent-1.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/escalated-investigation-agent-2.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/escalated-investigation-agent-3.md
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/escalated-investigation-agent-4.md

### Changes per file
1. Rename tests_run: → hypothesis_tests: in the RESULT schema block
2. Rename sub-fields: command → test, result → verdict, add observed: <what actually happened> between test and verdict
3. Update instructional prose: 'Record each empirical test in the tests_run section' → 'Record each empirical test in the hypothesis_tests section'
4. Remove ALL remaining RED markers from .test-index so all tests are fully GREEN

### Special notes
- cluster-investigation.md has THREE separate tests_run blocks (single-root-cause RESULT and two inside multi-root-cause RESULTS array) — rename ALL three
- escalated-investigation-agent-1.md uses WebSearch-specific placeholder: rename to 'test: <the WebSearch query or WebFetch URL used>' (preserving WebSearch guidance), NOT the generic 'test: <the test command run>'

### TDD
Tests from Task 1 (5f26-013c) that check prompt files go from RED → GREEN after this task.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — all tests GREEN, no RED markers remain
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] All 10 named prompt files contain hypothesis_tests
  Verify: for f in basic-investigation intermediate-investigation intermediate-investigation-fallback advanced-investigation-agent-a advanced-investigation-agent-b cluster-investigation escalated-investigation-agent-1 escalated-investigation-agent-2 escalated-investigation-agent-3 escalated-investigation-agent-4; do grep -q 'hypothesis_tests' "plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/${f}.md" || exit 1; done
- [ ] No prompt files contain old tests_run field name
  Verify: ! grep -rl 'tests_run' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/
- [ ] No RED markers remain in .test-index for this story's tests
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_.*hypothesis' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Exactly 10 prompt files exist in the prompts directory (scope guard)
  Verify: test $(ls plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/prompts/*.md | wc -l) -eq 10
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

1. For cluster-investigation.md: explicitly rename sub-fields (command→test, result→verdict, +observed) in ALL 3 hypothesis_tests blocks, not just the top-level field name.
2. For escalated-investigation-agent-1.md: use the same sub-field names (hypothesis, test, observed, verdict) but adapt the placeholder descriptions to match WebSearch semantics — e.g., 'test: <the WebSearch query or WebFetch URL used>', 'observed: <what the search/fetch returned>', 'verdict: confirmed | disproved | inconclusive'. Also update the field table description accordingly.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Verification complete — all tests pass, all ACs satisfied ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Renamed tests_run → hypothesis_tests in all 10 prompt files with correct sub-fields. All RED markers removed from .test-index.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
